mapper.sql: p.id, p.user_id, p.store_id, p.category_id, p.title, p.description, p.price_min, p.price_max, p.currency, p.location_text, p.status, p.moderation_reason, p.view_count, p.like_count, p.favorite_count, p.comment_count, p.published_at, p.deleted_at, p.created_at, p.updated_at, u.username AS author_username
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM posts p INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM posts p INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY p.published_at DESC, p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM posts WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED'

SELECT
FROM posts p INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY p.published_at DESC, p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT
FROM posts p INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status != 'DELETED' ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM posts WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status != 'DELETED'

SELECT
FROM posts p INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status != 'DELETED' ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM posts p WHERE

SELECT
FROM posts p INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE
ORDER BY (p.view_count + p.like_count * 3 + p.favorite_count * 4 + p.comment_count * 5) DESC, p.published_at DESC, p.id DESC
ORDER BY p.published_at DESC, p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC
LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PUBLISHED'

UPDATE posts SET store_id = #{storeId}, category_id = #{categoryId}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, price_min = #{priceMin}, price_max = #{priceMax}, currency = #{currency}, location_text = #{locationText} WHERE id = #{id} AND status != 'DELETED'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM posts WHERE status = 'PENDING_REVIEW'

SELECT
FROM posts p INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.status = 'PENDING_REVIEW' ORDER BY p.created_at ASC, p.id ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET status = 'PUBLISHED', published_at = CASE WHEN published_at IS NULL THEN NOW() ELSE published_at END, moderation_reason = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('PENDING_REVIEW', 'REJECTED', 'HIDDEN')
